faults.name: ub_port_down
faults.description: RoCE device unavailable, need to switch NIC and IP.

faults.name: ub_lane_down
faults.description: Data plane lane degraded. No NIC or IP switch needed.

faults.name: hca_port_down
faults.description: Host to network fault. Need to switch IP after fault.

faults.name: bond_member_down
faults.description: In Bond scenario, only one member fails. Bandwidth halved, can continue with SubHealth without IP switch.
